description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Testing Java API that runs on every pull request. The workflow should have read permission to repository contents. It should have two jobs: one for testing the Java API and another for checking ASCII safety of JavaScript files. Both jobs run on ubuntu-latest and harden the runner with step-security/harden-runner. The Java API job sets up JDK 8 and Maven, then uses Maven with the github-actions profile to test build tools and the Java API with Ant. The second job installs ascii-safe-cli and checks if .js API files are ASCII safe.
